calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing Fro Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Mar-05-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Caroline McCormick, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, GE CAPITAL INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS, INC., dba IKON FINANCIAL SERVICES.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) HUMAN SERVICES MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, a corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $46,334.44
Pre-Judgment Interest: $5,065.05
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $504.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $54,729.44
Judgment signed in open court.
